description_long: This is a rustic wooden armchair with a high backrest and sturdy construction, featuring a dark, weathered wood texture. The chair has prominent, rounded golden knobs on the tops of the backrest posts and at the ends of the armrests, adding a decorative and slightly regal touch. The seat and backrest are padded and upholstered in a dark material, with the backrest displaying a colorful, whimsical image of a cat wearing a hat. The frame is robust, with slightly uneven, hand-crafted lines that give it a vintage or artisanal appearance. The chair's overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for both decorative and functional use in urban outdoor or semi-public settings. The combination of materials and the unique backrest artwork make it a visually striking piece.
description: A rustic wooden armchair with golden knobs, padded seat and backrest, and a colorful cat illustration on the backrest. The chair has a sturdy, vintage look with decorative and comfortable features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded seat, armrests with golden knobs, and the colorful cat illustration on the backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's depth, thick armrest, and the profile of the golden knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tall, curved wooden backrest and the back of the frame, with no visible artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, golden knobs, and the chair's solid construction.
